sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتِ الأُمُّ لِتَسْجِيلِ ابْنِهَا فِي المَدْرَسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je otišla upisati sina u školu.
sentences.translationEn: The mother went to register her son at school.

sentences.translation: Direktor je tražio neke papire i dokumente.
sentences.translationEn: The principal asked for some papers and documents.

sentences.translation: Majka je donijela sve tražene papire.
sentences.translationEn: The mother brought all the required papers.

sentences.translation: Upis je završen i majka se jako obradovala.
sentences.translationEn: The registration was completed and the mother was very happy.

sentences.translation: Dječak će početi školu iduće sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: The boy will start school next week.
